title: uniform_batch_correction pipeline parameters
description: Standalone UniFORM-style normalization for cellmeasurement GeoJSON outputs

input.description: Path to samplesheet with sample and geojson columns

uniform_min_value.description: Minimum value threshold before log transform

uniform_exclude_pattern.description: Regex for measurement keys excluded from normalization

uniform_generate_plots.description: Generate QC plots for before/after distributions and scale factors

uniform_qc_top_n_keys.description: Number of most-changed keys to render before/after distribution plots

uniform_qc_max_heatmap_keys.description: Maximum number of keys shown in the scale-factor heatmap
